name: Kids' Bathroom Tumbler Rainbow - Pillowfort™
description: Give an instant update to your kid's bathroom while keeping it organized with this Bathroom Tumbler from Pillowfort™. Made from plastic, this tumbler features a slightly curved bottom for a sleek look that's easy to incorporate into many decor styles. The wide open top offers easy access to their toothpaste, toothbrush and other contents, plus the compact design makes it perfect to fit into many spaces. You can use it as a solo accent piece or with coordinating bath accessories to add a sleek flair to their bath space.
